ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state (e.g., AL, AK) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* The population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* The total area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "governor" TEXT /* The name of the current governor */,
  "capitol" TEXT /* The name of the state capital */,
  "latitude" REAL /* The latitude of the state capital */,
  "longitude" REAL /* The longitude of the state capital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "energy_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source (e.g., Solar, Wind) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* The average efficiency of the energy source in percentage */,
  "renewable_type" TEXT /* The type of renewable energy (e.g., solar, wind, hydro, geothermal, biopower) */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* A description of the environmental impact of the energy source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the facility is located */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source used by the facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the facility in megawatts */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the facility (e.g., operational, under construction) */,
  "location" TEXT /* The specific location of the facility (e.g., city, county) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* The date the facility was installed */,
  "expected_lifetime" INTEGER /* The expected operational lifetime of the facility in years */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency of maintenance required for the facility (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* The date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance" TEXT /* The date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "land_area" REAL /* The area of land used by the facility in square meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_facilities_energy_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("energy_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_facilities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility that produced the energy */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the energy was produced */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the energy was produced */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the energy was produced */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the energy was produced */,
  "energy_produced" REAL /* Amount of energy produced in megawatt-hours */,
  "production_cost" REAL /* The cost of producing the energy */,
  "production_revenue" REAL /* The revenue generated from the energy production */,
  "production_efficiency" REAL /* The efficiency of the production in percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES energy_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the energy was consumed */,
  "sector" INTEGER /* ID of the sector that consumed the energy */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the energy was consumed */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the energy was consumed */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the energy was consumed */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the energy was consumed */,
  "energy_consumed" REAL /* Amount of energy consumed in megawatt-hours */,
  "consumption_cost" REAL /* The cost of the energy consumption */,
  "consumption_revenue" REAL /* The revenue generated from the energy consumption */,
  "consumption_efficiency" REAL /* The efficiency of the consumption in percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the energy was priced */,
  "sector" INTEGER /* ID of the sector that was priced */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the energy was priced */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the energy was priced */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the energy was priced */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the energy was priced */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of energy in dollars per megawatt-hour */,
  "price_trend" TEXT /* The trend of the energy price (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "price_source" TEXT /* The source of the energy price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_prices_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_prices_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incentives" (
  "incentive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incentive */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state that offers the incentive */,
  "incentive_name" TEXT /* Name of the incentive (e.g., tax credit, grant) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incentive */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the incentive */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the incentive */,
  "amount" TEXT /* The amount of the incentive (e.g., $1000, 10% tax credit) */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* The criteria for eligibility to receive the incentive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incentive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incentives_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state that has the policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy (e.g., net metering law) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "enactment_date" TEXT /* The date the policy was enacted */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* The date the policy expires */,
  "legislation_number" TEXT /* The number of the legislation that enacted the policy */,
  "amendments" TEXT /* Any amendments to the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* The status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility owned */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the owner */,
  "ownership_percentage" REAL /* The percentage of ownership */,
  "ownership_start_date" TEXT /* The date the ownership began */,
  "ownership_end_date" TEXT /* The date the ownership ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_owners_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES energy_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility contacted */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the contact */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* The type of contact (e.g., manager, technical support) */,
  "contact_start_date" TEXT /* The date the contact started */,
  "contact_end_date" TEXT /* The date the contact ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_contacts_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES energy_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* A unique code for the sector */,
  "sector_type" TEXT /* The type of sector (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial, transportation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the year is the current year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)
